StateMachine.name: DemoFsmMetadata
StateMachine.description: Demo FSM showing descriptions, defaults, and hierarchical parameter forwarding across a nested state machine.

Param.name: root_prefix
Param.description: Prefix forwarded directly to Foo and indirectly to the nested Bar state.

Param.name: root_delay_ms
Param.description: Delay in milliseconds forwarded across all demo states.

Param.name: root_max_count
Param.description: Maximum number of loops executed by the top-level Foo state.

Key.name: foo_str
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.

StateMachine.name: NestedSM
StateMachine.description: Nested FSM that declares its own parameters and forwards them again to the Bar state.

Param.name: shared_prefix
Param.description: Prefix received from the parent state machine and forwarded to Bar.

Param.name: shared_delay_ms
Param.description: Delay received from the parent state machine and forwarded to Bar.
